The beautiful temporary home of the world’s greatest football club in the capital of Catalonia is the site of another huge La Liga match between visitors Mallorca and leaders Barcelona, who come into this one looking to temporarily extend their lead at the top of the table to seven points and stay in control of a very tight title race. We don’t have a lot of rules here, but there are a few things to keep in mind when joining our matchday threads:
